next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/shlink-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add BIND (or Cloudflare) A records for shlink.default_domain and shlink.web_client.public_url when used.
Configure nginx-waf sites[]: short/API upstream http://<ct-ip>:8080; web client upstream http://<ct-ip>:8081.
Back up HDC_SHLINK_INITIAL_API_KEY — required for the web UI and REST API.
Optional: set HDC_SHLINK_GEOLITE_LICENSE_KEY in vault and re-run maintain for visit geolocation.
Keep HDC_SHLINK_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing it makes the Postgres volume unrecoverable.
